destinations.name: Maldives
destinations.label: Island Paradise
destinations.description: Crystal clear waters, overwater bungalows, and breathtaking sunsets. A once-in-a-lifetime destination.

destinations.name: Swiss Alps
destinations.label: Mountains
destinations.description: Snow-capped peaks, charming villages, and world-class skiing. A dream for adventure seekers.

destinations.name: Kyoto
destinations.label: Culture
destinations.description: Ancient temples, cherry blossoms, and zen gardens. Kyoto offers an unparalleled cultural experience.

destinations.name: Bali
destinations.label: Beach
destinations.description: Lush rice terraces, vibrant temples, and pristine beaches. Bali is the island of the gods.

destinations.name: Paris
destinations.label: City
destinations.description: The city of love, art, and fashion. From the Eiffel Tower to world-class cuisine, Paris enchants all.

destinations.name: Santorini
destinations.label: Island
destinations.description: Iconic white-washed buildings, volcanic beaches, and the most beautiful sunsets in the world.
